title: cynoctonum ovalifolium
intro: Cynoctonum ovalifolium, also known as Oval-leafed Cynoctonum or Mountain Grape, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a diuretic and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cynoctonum ovalifolium include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections and reduce inflammation in the body. Cynoctonum ovalifolium can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and its herbal preparations are often used to treat various health issues.
